items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the eligibility rules related to invoice status and amount thresholds. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms these eligibility rules have been implemented or validated through API reads or persisted state checks. The absence of such evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
